title: pogostemon koehneanus
intro: Pogostemon koehneanus, also known as Patchouli Amboin, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in Indonesia and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pogostemon koehneanus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce anxiety and stress, and aid in wound healing. Pogostemon koehneanus is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
